last_commit_subject: fix(ci): replace placeholder SHAs with inline workflow

language_stack.ci: GitHub Actions (14 workflows: ci, cargo-audit, cargo-deny, cargo-machete, cargo-semver-checks, codeql, codeql-rust, doc-links, fr-coverage, legacy-tooling-gate, quality-gate, scorecard, trufflehog, plus ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ + PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE)

evidence: README.md (104 lines) with pinned-references header, stack table, quick-start, related projects
CHANGELOG.md (82 lines, Keep-a-Changelog-style, organized by Features/Bug Fixes/Docs/Other)
SECURITY.md (24 lines, GitHub Security Advisories + cargo-deny/CodeQL refs)

dup_exposure: phenotype-request-id (correlation ID type; overlaps with tracely-core::LogContext::correlation_id and TraceContext::trace_id/span_id — could consume the canonical type)
phenotype-bus / phenotype-event-bus (event bus for emitting trace/metric events; also noted in PhenoObservability's dup_exposure list)
PhenoObservability (parent platform; Cargo.toml ships tracely-core + tracely-sentinel + helix-logging crates — direct overlap with this repo's crates; convergence target)
Tracera (distributed-tracing backend/storage that Tracely producers are meant to feed; consumer-side coupling)
phenotype-shared / phenoShared (shared types; potential home for TraceContext/LogContext adapters)
phenotype-dep-guard (cargo-deny/audit policy enforcement; could share org baseline with Tracely's deny.toml)
phenotype-tooling (shared just/lint/CI recipes; Tracely already uses quality-gate + fr-coverage + legacy-tooling-gate workflows)
phenotype-journeys (journey-tracing primitives could be emitted as spans/logs via tracely-core)
phenotype-postfx (post-effect / middleware runner that could host #[instrument] wrappers or redaction middleware)
phenotype-skills (agent-skill alignment; Tracely could expose observability playbooks as phenotype skills)
sota_gaps: OTLP exporter not implemented — OpenTelemetry is an optional dep (0.27) but no OTLP/HTTP or OTLP/g exporter wires traces/metrics/logs off-process; README claims 'OTLP, Prometheus, Jaeger, Zipkin' support but the code only ships env_logger + tracing-subscriber fmt layer
Prometheus exporter not implemented — prometheus is an optional dep (0.13) but no prometheus::Registry or /metrics HTTP handler exists in tracely-core or any workspace crate
Jaeger / Zipkin exporters missing — README claims them; code has none
Tail-based / adaptive sampling — only EnvFilter-level filtering exists; no Sampler trait, no ParentBased(TraceIDRatioBased), no cost-aware sampling
Exemplars (metric↔trace linking) — no exemplar field on metrics; Prometheus exporter path lacks exemplar support
OTel Logs protocol — only custom `log_json!` macro to stdout; no OTLP/logs exporter and no bridge from `log` crate to opentelemetry-appender
PII / data scrubbing / redaction — no automatic span/log field allow-list, hash-redaction, or value-pattern masking
Cardinality control / metrics limits — no metric-name or label-value cardinality guard rails
SLO primitives — tracely-sentinel ships rate-limiter/circuit-breaker/bulkhead but no error-budget or burn-rate alert types
Auto-instrumentation — no #[auto-instrument] for axum/actix/tonic/sqlx; consumers must hand-instrument
Log-to-trace correlation — LogContext::correlation_id and TraceContext::trace_id are independent UUIDs; no auto-stitching of log fields into active spans
Dynamic reconfiguration (hot-reload of TracingConfig/LoggerConfig) — init helpers are fire-and-forget; no file-watch or admin endpoint
Profile / continuous-profiling signal — no eBPF, Pyroscope, or OTLP profiling integration
Real-User Monitoring (RUM) / web SDK — no browser surface; no web-vitals or session-replay
Mobile SDKs (iOS/Android) — no native bindings; zero zig/wasi surface (stubs directories only)
convergence_rationale: Pure-Rust observability primitives hub. The repo is a consolidation target: it absorbed helix-logging + helix-tracing (archived 2026-03-26) and now also carries tracely-sentinel (circuit-breaker/rate-limiter/bulkhead/validation) and helix-tracing crate. It is the producer-side counterpart to Tracera (consumer) and the consumer-side leaf of PhenoObservability (which contains the same tracely-core/tracely-sentinel crates — strong consolidation signal). Language stack is rust-only (no polyglot bindings, no stubs of weight), so not multi-stack; not a web or live product; lives in the convergence lane with PhenoObservability.

action_items.title: Decide Tracely vs PhenoObservability ownership of tracely-core / tracely-sentinel / helix-tracing
action_items.why: Both repos carry the same crate names (PhenoObservability/Cargo.toml:6-8 lists tracely-core + tracely-sentinel; this repo's Cargo.toml:3-7 lists the same). Two sources of truth will drift. Pick one as canonical, move the other to a path-dep or remove. The local branch is 2 commits ahead of origin/main — fold those into the consolidation PR.

action_items.title: Implement OTLP/HTTP (and gRPC) exporter for traces + metrics + logs
action_items.why: Closes the largest SOTA gap: README promises 'OTLP, Prometheus, Jaeger, Zipkin' but only env_logger + tracing-subscriber fmt are wired. An OTLP exporter unblocks off-process span shipping and aligns with OpenTelemetry 0.27's opentelemetry-otlp / opentelemetry-appender crates. Use tonic for gRPC, reqwest for HTTP.

action_items.title: Replace tracely-core's local LogContext::correlation_id with phenotype-request-id
action_items.why: LogContext and TraceContext each roll their own UUID-based correlation fields. The Phenotype ecosystem has phenotype-request-id as the canonical type. Migrating aligns the surface with phenotype-bus / phenotype-journeys consumers and unblocks cross-service correlation across the org.

action_items.title: Add PII redaction + cardinality-limit middleware to tracely-core
action_items.why: Two adjacent SOTA gaps (scrubbing, cardinality control) share a span/log/metric post-processor layer. Building them together is cheaper than two passes; both are blockers for production data-handling review (PII risk today).

action_items.title: Implement a Sampler trait + tail-based sampler with cost feedback
action_items.why: Replaces the static EnvFilter with a real Sampler (ParentBased(TraceIDRatioBased) default + tail-based span-keep evaluator). Highest-leverage production-readiness gap; also unblocks SLO error-budget alerts downstream in tracely-sentinel.

notes: Local branch is 2 commits ahead of origin/main (bda57db + 1af3d2c). The 'chore(snapshot): preserve Tracely local dirty state 2026-06-07 r2' commit is a local-state preservation commit — fold or rebase before publishing the audit branch.

Workspace lists 3 members (helix-tracing, tracely-core, tracely-sentinel) but Cargo.lock shows only tracely-core + tracely-sentinel resolved; helix-tracing is still on disk as a stale crate from before the 0.2.0 absorb (per CHANGELOG: feat: absorb helix-logging and helix-tracing into tracely, 8542609). Verify with `cargo metadata` and prune.
phenotype-logging-zig/ and zerokit/ directories exist in crates/ but are empty (64 B each, no Cargo.toml) — confirm whether they are intentional stubs to keep or stale dirs to delete.
CHANGELOG.md is generated (cliff.toml present) — release automation is set up but no recent release tag visible (VERSION file = '0.0.0' while tracely-core/Cargo.toml:6 = '0.2.0' — version drift).
AGENTS.md at repo root (18993B) is extensive and overrides the project_guidelines in this audit; trust the in-repo AGENTS.md over the system-level one for repo-specific commands.
